Committee: Commerce, Economic Development And Small Business

Milestones.Committee: Commerce, Economic Development And Small Business

Actions.Text: REFERRED TO COMMERCE, ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND SMALL BUSINESS

Title: Relates to license fees required to be paid by wholesale beer licensees to sell cider
Summary: Requires wholesale beer licensees to only need to pay a one time additional license fee to sell cider.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the alcoholic beverage control law, in relation to license fees required to be paid by wholesale beer licensees to sell cider
